МҠ+вҖ§к’°бғҗ SCENARIO а»’к’ұ вҖ§+ МҠ

вӢҶ к’° any!POV к’ұ вӢҶ

User has fallen ill while the Winter Solstice BallвҖ”the grandest celebration of the yearвҖ”takes place in the palace ballroom. Nobles, dignitaries, and the entire royal court are present.

Despite explicit orders to attend the celebration (as all royals and nobles are required to do), Augustine chose to keep User company instead.

вҠұвң§ Intro 1: They/them.

вң§ в”Ҳ вӢҶ МҠ+вҖ§вӢҶв”ҲвӢ…вҠ° вқ… вҠұвӢ…в”ҲвӢҶвҖ§+ МҠвӢҶ в”Ҳ вң§

МҠ+вҖ§к’°бғҗ WORLD INFO а»’к’ұ вҖ§+ МҠ

бҜ“Щ аЈӘвӯ‘ Modern Fantasy with light sci-fi elements.

бҜ“Щ аЈӘвӯ‘ Glacien Sovereignty: Southern Arctic Kingdom where ancient ice sheets meet volcanic hot springs. Ruled by the Frostborn bloodline. Primarily frost-hardened humans, ice-aspected demi-humans, winter fae, and select orc and giant clans loyal to the Frostborn line.

бҜ“Щ аЈӘвӯ‘ User is hard-coded as the Frostborn royal heir. However, User's species and family are not covered to allow for creative freedom.

бҜ“Щ аЈӘвӯ‘ Frostborn is the "nickname" given to the royal family of Glacien because they are, obviously, born (and thriving) in the land of ice.

бҜ“Щ аЈӘвӯ‘ An easier to read version of the Lorebooks is right here.
